mainEntity.name: Can I choose my doctor after Murray UT work accident?
mainEntity.text: Can I choose my doctor after Murray UT work accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: No use employer panel first switch after 3 visits with approval.[19]

suggestedAnswer.text: Murray panel doctors insurer-friendly; document bias seek change. Independent exam at own cost strengthens appeal. Right doctor critical for rating approval ratings.[19]

name: Choosing Doctor After Murray Work Injury
description: No use employer panel first switch after 3 visits with approval.[19]
